title: Verify+lock COR-001/COR-002 (036+037) full-file readLedger + partial-tail
description: ISS-036/037 在 worktree 中已修复（ledger-scan.readLedger full-file + trailing-newline pop；event-reader.parseJsonlEvents partial-tail drop）。本任务禁止重写实现，只验证契约、补齐/确认测试与 smoke evidence，并准备 close 证据。
action: Verify packages/cli/templates/hooks/lib/ledger-scan.cjs::readLedger uses readFileSync full-file (NOT eventReader.readRecentEvents / DEFAULT_TAIL_BYTES) and drops last line when raw lacks trailing newline; verify packages/cli/templates/hooks/lib/event-reader.cjs::parseJsonlEvents pops final fragment without trailing newline; run fabric-hint partial-tail tests + optional inline full-vs-tail smoke; write close evidence only — no behavior rewrite if already correct.

criteria: packages/cli/templates/hooks/lib/ledger-scan.cjs readLedger body contains readFileSync(eventPath and does NOT call readRecentEvents
packages/cli/templates/hooks/lib/ledger-scan.cjs contains hasTrailingNewline / endsWith("\n") and lines.pop() for partial-tail drop
packages/cli/templates/hooks/lib/event-reader.cjs parseJsonlEvents drops final fragment when !raw.endsWith("\n") via lines.pop()
pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli exec vitest run __tests__/fabric-hint.test.ts exits 0 and includes readLedger partial-tail cases
optional smoke: full-file readLedger sees EARLY marker on large ledger while readRecentEvents 256KB tail misses it (if smoke script run)
convergence.verification: 1) rg -n 'readRecentEvents|readFileSync|endsWith|lines.pop' packages/cli/templates/hooks/lib/ledger-scan.cjs packages/cli/templates/hooks/lib/event-reader.cjs; 2) pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli exec vitest run __tests__/fabric-hint.test.ts; 3) if needed, node smoke comparing full vs tail EARLY marker + partial-tail lengths.
convergence.definition_of_done: 036/037 契约被测试锁定；实现确认 full-file + partial-tail；可 close 两条 issue，无需行为改动。

files.change: Confirm full-file readFileSync + trailing-newline pop; do not route through readRecentEvents(DEFAULT_TAIL_BYTES=256KB)
Confirm final fragment drop when raw lacks trailing newline
Only if coverage gaps: ensure partial-tail + corrupt-line contracts remain; prefer no churn if tests already cover

implementation: Read ledger-scan.cjs::readLedger and confirm comments + body: full-file readFileSync, hasTrailingNewline pop, JSON.parse per line
Read event-reader.cjs::parseJsonlEvents and confirm same trailing-newline pop contract
Confirm fabric-hint.test.ts describe('fabric-hint.cjs — readLedger') includes partial-tail drop case; add only if missing
Run vitest fabric-hint.test.ts; optionally rerun prior cor001_smoke (full has EARLY, tail lacks EARLY, partial-tail lengths)
Record evidence for issue close of ISS-20260713-036 and ISS-20260713-037 (point to verification.json COR-001/COR-002 + current test pass)

success_metrics: no call path from readLedger to readRecentEvents

reference.pattern: Prior COR-001/COR-002 fix evidence in residual-issues-011-020 verification.json

rationale.chosen_approach: verify-and-close avoids reimplementation churn on already-correct COR fixes while still closing residual registered issue records
rationale.tradeoffs: Does not further unify ledger parsers (out of scope 032/008)

risks: Executor may reimplement unnecessarily — guard with verify-first instruction
Tests only via fabric-hint facade re-export; acceptable if facade still re-exports readLedger
